_meta.description: Seed database of 50 verified chemical formulations for Formula AI Global
sources: Industry-standard formulations from peer-reviewed cosmetic literature
GHS classification system for safety data
_meta.validation: All percentages sum to 100.0% ± 0.1% · All CAS numbers verified against NIST/ECHA

formulas.description: Sulfate-free daily shampoo suitable for sensitive scalps, balanced surfactant system with conditioning agents.
Therapeutic anti-dandruff shampoo using zinc pyrithione 1% as active ingredient.
Cream-based conditioner with argan oil and hydrolyzed proteins for damaged hair.
Lightweight aqueous serum with niacinamide for hyperpigmentation and pore minimization.
safety_warnings: May cause flushing in sensitive skin

formulas.description: Light moisturizing cream with multi-weight hyaluronic acid for daily hydration.
Broad-spectrum mineral sunscreen with non-nano zinc oxide and titanium dioxide.
Stable L-ascorbic acid 15% serum with ferulic acid and vitamin E.

source.title: J Invest Dermatol, Pinnell 2001 - CE Ferulic

formulas.description: Mild amphoteric face cleanser for normal to sensitive skin.
Daily body wash with rich foam and skin-conditioning glycerin.
Fluoride toothpaste with hydrated silica abrasive for stain removal.
Heavy-duty alkaline floor cleaner for commercial and industrial use.
High-foaming dishwash with grease-cutting performance for hand washing.
Phosphate-free biodegradable laundry powder with enzymes.
safety_warnings: May cause respiratory irritation if inhaled as dust

formulas.description: Chlorine-based bathroom cleaner for tile, grout, and shower surfaces.
safety_warnings: DO NOT MIX WITH AMMONIA OR ACIDS — releases toxic chloramine/chlorine gas

formulas.description: Neutral-pH all-purpose cleaner safe on most household surfaces.
Streak-free glass cleaner with isopropyl alcohol for fast evaporation.
safety_warnings: DO NOT MIX WITH BLEACH — toxic chloramine gas

formulas.description: Quaternary ammonium disinfectant effective against bacteria, viruses, fungi.
safety_warnings: DO NOT MIX WITH ANIONIC SURFACTANTS — neutralizes biocide
EPA registration required for label claims

formulas.description: WHO-recommended hand sanitizer formula with 70% alcohol.

source.title: WHO Guide to Local Production: Formulation 1

formulas.description: pH-neutral car wash with carnauba wax and gloss enhancers.
OAT-based ethylene glycol coolant with 5-year service life.
safety_warnings: TOXIC IF SWALLOWED — bittering agent recommended

formulas.description: Lithium 12-hydroxystearate grease for general bearing applications.
Water-based acrylic emulsion paint for interior walls.
High-range water-reducing admixture for concrete (15-25% water reduction).
Two-component aliphatic PU varnish for hardwood floors and furniture.
Oil-based polish for stainless steel appliances and fixtures.
Plant-based liquid hand soap with potassium-saponified oils.
Low-viscosity foaming hand soap with benzalkonium chloride 0.13%.
Aqueous-based antiperspirant with aluminum chlorohydrate 20%.
Daily body lotion with shea butter and natural oils.
Reconstitutable powder for sports hydration with optimal sodium/potassium ratio.
Balanced foliar fertilizer with chelated micronutrients.
Emulsifiable concentrate insecticide for crop protection.
safety_warnings: TOXIC TO BEES — do not apply during bloom
TOXIC TO FISH — keep away from waterways

formulas.description: Phosphate-free automatic dishwasher detergent with enzymes.
Concentrated rinse-cycle fabric softener with esterquat cationic.
safety_warnings: DO NOT MIX WITH ANIONIC DETERGENTS - use in rinse cycle only

formulas.description: Standard household chlorine bleach.
safety_warnings: NEVER MIX WITH AMMONIA OR ACIDS — releases toxic chlorine gas

formulas.description: Hydrochloric acid-based cleaner for limescale removal in toilets.
safety_warnings: NEVER MIX WITH BLEACH OR AMMONIA
Use only on toilet bowl interior

formulas.description: High-pigment matte lipstick formula with long-wear silicone polymers.
safety_warnings: Do not use on broken skin

formulas.description: Water-resistant mascara with film-forming polymers and beeswax.
Two-part oxidative permanent hair color (cream + developer).
safety_warnings: MAY CAUSE ALLERGIC REACTION — Patch test 48h before use

formulas.description: Rich eye cream with peptides, retinol, and caffeine for fine lines.
FDA OTC anti-acne gel with salicylic acid maximum strength.
safety_warnings: Sun sensitivity may increase — use SPF
Do not use on broken skin

source.title: FDA OTC Topical Acne Drug Products 21 CFR 333

formulas.description: Alcohol-based antiseptic mouthwash with essential oils.

source.title: FDA OTC Oral Health Care Drug Products 21 CFR 356

formulas.description: Water-based air freshener spray with odor-neutralizing complex.
Pure white petrolatum for skin protection.
DEET-based mosquito and tick repellent (CDC recommended).
safety_warnings: Do not apply to hands/face of children
Avoid contact with synthetic fabrics, plastics

formulas.description: Polyvinyl acetate emulsion for wood and porous materials.
safety_warnings: Note: DBT phthalate restricted in toys per EU REACH

formulas.description: Fast-setting ethyl cyanoacrylate instant adhesive.
safety_warnings: BONDS SKIN INSTANTLY — see acetone for removal
Do not use on cotton/wool — exothermic reaction

formulas.description: Dough conditioner blend for improved volume and shelf life.
Mild tear-free dog/cat shampoo for sensitive pet skin.
safety_warnings: Do NOT use essential oils toxic to cats (e.g., tea tree)

formulas.description: Self-tanner with dihydroxyacetone for natural tan in 4-8 hours.
safety_warnings: Does NOT provide sun protection — use SPF separately
compliance: FDA (DHA approved as color additive for external use)
